name: @jefferylau/euphony-skills
description: Install Euphony viewer skills for Codex and CodeBuddy.

scripts.check: node --check bin/euphony-skills.mjs && node --check skills/_shared/euphony-runtime.mjs && node --check skills/codex-euphony/scripts/codex-euphony.mjs && node --check skills/codebuddy-euphony/scripts/codebuddy-sessions.mjs && node --check skills/codebuddy-euphony/scripts/codebuddy-converter.mjs && node --check skills/codebuddy-euphony/scripts/codebuddy-euphony.mjs && node test/codex-current.test.mjs && node test/codebuddy-convert.test.mjs
